name: @evalops/slack-agent
description: Slack bot agent with Docker sandbox support for Composer

scripts.build: node -e "require('fs').rmSync('dist', { recursive: true, force: true })" && node -e "require('fs').mkdirSync('../../tmp/tsbuildinfo', { recursive: true })" && tsc -b tsconfig.build.json && bun build ./src/index.ts --target node --packages external --outfile dist/index.js && bun build ./src/main.ts --target node --packages external --outfile dist/main.js && chmod +x dist/main.js
scripts.check: node -e "require('fs').mkdirSync('../../tmp/tsbuildinfo', { recursive: true })" && tsc -b tsconfig.build.json --pretty false
scripts.prepublishOnly: npm run clean && npm run build

author: EvalOps
